content.json:
Tailscale Operations (Premium)
Single-pane visibility into your Tailscale tailnet on Personal (Free), Starter and Premium tiers: who, what, when, where, and what changed. Scope every panel with the time range below; the Investigate tab adds Actor and Device pickers for drilldown. Premium-tier panels (network flow logs, posture integrations) live in the separate Tailscale Operations (Premium) workbook.

content.query:
let DEV = Tailscale_Devices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId;
let USR = Tailscale_Users_CL   | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId;
let KEY = Tailscale_Keys_CL    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId;
union
  (DEV | summarize V=toreal(count())                                            | extend Metric="Devices",         Order=1),
  (DEV | where Authorized == true                                               | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Authorized",      Order=2),
  (DEV | where UpdateAvailable == true                                          | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Updates Available", Order=3),
  (DEV | where SshEnabled == true                                               | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="SSH-Enabled",     Order=4),
  (USR | summarize V=toreal(count())                                            | extend Metric="Users",           Order=5),
  (USR | where Role =~ "admin" or Role =~ "owner" or Role =~ "network-admin"    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Admins",          Order=6),
  (KEY | where isnull(Revoked) and (isnull(Expires) or Expires > now())         | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Active Keys",     Order=7),
  (Tailscale_Audit_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Audit Events ({TimeRange:label})", Order=8)
,
  (Tailscale_Network_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize V=toreal(count())                                  | extend Metric="Flows ({TimeRange:label})", Order=9),
  (Tailscale_Network_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize V=toreal(dcount(SrcNodeName))                      | extend Metric="Active Talkers",           Order=10),
  (Tailscale_Network_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize V=toreal(iff(count()==0, 0.0, 100.0 * countif(IsRelayed) / count())) | extend Metric="DERP Relayed %",  Order=11),
  (Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Posture Integrations", Order=12)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Action
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Audit events by action
content.noDataMessage: No audit events in the selected window. Widen the time range; remember the Tailscale audit poll runs every ~30 min.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Actor=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName, Actor.type))
| where isnotempty(Actor)
| summarize Events=count(), DistinctActions=dcount(Action), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Actor
| order by Events desc | take 15
content.title: Top actors (by event count)

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type)
| where isnotempty(TargetType)
| summarize Events=count() by TargetType
| order by Events desc | take 15
content.title: Activity by target type

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Actor=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName, Actor.type))
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type), TargetName=tostring(coalesce(Target.name, Target.id))
| project TimeGenerated, Action, Actor, TargetType, TargetName, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 30
content.title: Most recent 30 audit events

parameters.name: SelectedActor
parameters.label: Actor
parameters.query:
let opts = Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| where isnotempty(ActorLogin)
| summarize Events=count() by ActorLogin
| project value=ActorLogin, label=strcat(ActorLogin, " (", tostring(Events), " events)");
(print value="__ALL__", label="(All actors)")
| union opts

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| where "{SelectedActor}" == "__ALL__" or ActorLogin == "{SelectedActor}"
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Action
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Actions over time -- actor: {SelectedActor:label}
content.noDataMessage: Select an actor from the Actor dropdown above, or leave on 'All' to see total activity.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| where "{SelectedActor}" == "__ALL__" or ActorLogin == "{SelectedActor}"
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type), TargetName=tostring(coalesce(Target.name, Target.id))
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetType, TargetName, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Recent events for actor: {SelectedActor:label}
content.noDataMessage: No events for this actor in the selected window.

parameters.name: SelectedDevice
parameters.label: Device
parameters.query:
let opts = Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| order by LastSeen desc | take 100
| project value=DeviceName, label=strcat(coalesce(DeviceName, Hostname), " (", User, ")");
(print value="__ALL__", label="(All devices)")
| union opts

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| where "{SelectedDevice}" == "__ALL__" or DeviceName == "{SelectedDevice}"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| extend OnlineNow = ClientConnectivity.endpoints != "" or ConnectedToControl == true
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, UpdateAvailable, Authorized, IsExternal, SshEnabled, LastSeen, Expires, KeyExpiryDisabled, OnlineNow, Addresses, Tags, AdvertisedRoutes
content.title: Summary for device: {SelectedDevice:label}
content.noDataMessage: Select a device from the Device dropdown above. Defaults to 'All'.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type), TargetName=tostring(Target.name), TargetId=tostring(Target.id)
| where ("{SelectedDevice}" == "__ALL__" and TargetType == "NODE") or TargetName == "{SelectedDevice}"
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, TargetName, TargetId, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Audit events touching device: {SelectedDevice:label}
content.noDataMessage: No audit events recorded against the selected device in this window. Tailscale tags device events with Target.type=NODE; the audit feed only emits NODE events on create/update/delete, so quiet devices stay quiet here.

content.json: First-seen actors in the last 24h

content.title: Actors who have NEVER appeared before (30d baseline)
content.noDataMessage: Every actor seen in the last 24h has appeared at least once in the prior 30d. Healthy state.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Hour=hourofday(TimeGenerated), DayOfWeek=dayofweek(TimeGenerated)/1d
| where Hour < 7 or Hour > 19 or DayOfWeek in (0, 6)
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type)
| where Action !in ("LOGIN", "LOGOUT")
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetType, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Admin actions outside 07:00-19:00 weekdays
content.noDataMessage: No off-hours admin changes recorded - healthy state for an organisation working business hours.

content.json: Devices with key expiry disabled

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where KeyExpiryDisabled == true
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, LastSeen, Authorized, Tags
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices that will never re-authenticate (high-risk drift)
content.noDataMessage: No devices have key expiry disabled - good. Disabling key expiry creates devices that never re-auth, drifting from policy.

content.json: Auth keys with no expiry

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| where isnull(Revoked) and (isnull(Expires) or ExpirySeconds == 0)
| project KeyId, Description, UserId, KeyType, Created, Capabilities
| order by Created desc
content.title: Active keys that never expire
content.noDataMessage: No never-expiring auth keys - rotation hygiene is good.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where UpdateAvailable == true
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, LastSeen, Tags
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices flagged update-available by Tailscale
content.noDataMessage: All devices on current client - nothing to patch.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where LastSeen < ago(30d)
| extend DaysIdle = toint((now() - LastSeen) / 1d)
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, LastSeen, DaysIdle, Authorized, Tags
| order by DaysIdle desc
content.title: Devices idle 30+ days - candidates for retirement
content.noDataMessage: No devices idle 30+ days - inventory is fresh.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where array_length(AdvertisedRoutes) > 0 or array_length(EnabledRoutes) > 0
| extend Routes = tostring(EnabledRoutes), Advertised = tostring(AdvertisedRoutes)
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, Advertised, Routes, LastSeen, SshEnabled, Authorized
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices advertising or running subnet routes / exit-node duty
content.noDataMessage: No devices advertising subnet routes. Pure mesh topology.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where SshEnabled == true
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, LastSeen, Authorized, Tags
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices with Tailscale SSH enabled (Tailscale-managed remote-shell access)
content.noDataMessage: No devices have Tailscale SSH enabled - no SSH-via-Tailscale risk surface.

content.query:
let U = Tailscale_Users_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId;
union
  (U | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                | extend Metric="Total users",        Order=1),
  (U | where Role in~ ("admin","owner","network-admin","it-admin","billing-admin") | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Admin-tier users",  Order=2),
  (U | where Status =~ "active"                                                   | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Active",            Order=3),
  (U | where CurrentlyConnected == true                                           | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Connected now",     Order=4),
  (U | where Status =~ "idle" or LastSeen < ago(30d)                              | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Idle / dormant",    Order=5),
  (U | where UserType =~ "shared"                                                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Shared (external)", Order=6)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| summarize Count=count() by Role
| order by Count desc
content.title: Users by role

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| summarize Count=count() by Status
| order by Count desc
content.title: Users by status

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| summarize Count=count() by UserType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Users by type (member / shared)

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| extend DaysSinceLogin = toint((now() - LastSeen) / 1d)
| extend Bucket = case(
    DaysSinceLogin < 1, "Today",
    DaysSinceLogin < 7, "This week",
    DaysSinceLogin < 30, "This month",
    DaysSinceLogin < 90, "Past quarter",
    "90+ days")
| summarize Users=count() by Bucket
| order by case(Bucket=="Today",1, Bucket=="This week",2, Bucket=="This month",3, Bucket=="Past quarter",4, 5) asc
content.title: Users by recency of last login

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| project DisplayName, LoginName, Role, Status, UserType, DeviceCount, CurrentlyConnected, Created, LastSeen
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: All users (latest snapshot per user ID)

content.json: Orphaned users (active but no devices)

content.query:
Tailscale_Users_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by UserId
| where Status =~ "active" and DeviceCount == 0
| project DisplayName, LoginName, Role, UserType, Created, LastSeen
| order by Created desc
content.title: Active accounts with zero devices - candidates for offboarding review
content.noDataMessage: Every active account has at least one device - good hygiene.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action == "USER_ROLE_UPDATE" or Action == "USER_ROLES_ASSIGNED" or Action contains "ROLE"
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| extend TargetName=tostring(coalesce(Target.name, Target.id))
| extend FromRole=tostring(Old.role), ToRole=tostring(New.role)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetName, FromRole, ToRole, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent role changes
content.noDataMessage: No role changes in this window.

content.query:
let D = Tailscale_Devices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId;
union
  (D | summarize V=toreal(count())                              | extend Metric="Total devices",       Order=1),
  (D | where Authorized == true                                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Authorized",          Order=2),
  (D | where IsExternal == true                                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="External (shared)",   Order=3),
  (D | where UpdateAvailable == true                            | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Updates available",   Order=4),
  (D | where SshEnabled == true                                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="SSH-enabled",         Order=5),
  (D | where KeyExpiryDisabled == true                          | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="No key expiry",       Order=6),
  (D | where array_length(AdvertisedRoutes) > 0                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Subnet/exit-node",    Order=7),
  (D | where LastSeen < ago(30d)                                | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Stale (30+ days)",    Order=8)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count=count() by Os
| order by Count desc
content.title: Devices by OS

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count=count() by ClientVersion
| order by Count desc | take 10
content.title: Top 10 client versions

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| mv-expand Tag = Tags to typeof(string)
| summarize Devices=dcount(DeviceId) by Tag=iff(isempty(Tag), "(untagged)", Tag)
| order by Devices desc
content.title: Devices by tag

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where UpdateAvailable == true or KeyExpiryDisabled == true or LastSeen < ago(30d) or Authorized == false
| extend Issues = strcat_array(pack_array(
    iff(UpdateAvailable == true, "needs-update", ""),
    iff(KeyExpiryDisabled == true, "key-never-expires", ""),
    iff(LastSeen < ago(30d), "stale", ""),
    iff(Authorized == false, "unauthorized", "")), ",")
| extend Issues = trim(",", trim_start(",", trim_end(",", replace_string(Issues, ",,", ","))))
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, LastSeen, Issues
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices flagged with one or more issues
content.noDataMessage: No devices need attention - all updated, fresh, authorized, and key-rotating.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, ClientVersion, UpdateAvailable, Authorized, IsExternal, SshEnabled, LastSeen, KeyExpiryDisabled, Tags, AdvertisedRoutes
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: All devices (latest snapshot per device ID)

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where array_length(AdvertisedRoutes) > 0
| extend AdvertisedSummary = tostring(AdvertisedRoutes), EnabledSummary = tostring(EnabledRoutes)
| project DeviceName, Hostname, User, Os, AdvertisedSummary, EnabledSummary, LastSeen, Authorized
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Devices advertising subnet routes or exit-node capability
content.noDataMessage: No subnet routers in this tailnet - pure mesh topology.

content.query:
let K = Tailscale_Keys_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId;
union
  (K | summarize V=toreal(count())                                     | extend Metric="Total keys",          Order=1),
  (K | where isnull(Revoked) and (isnull(Expires) or Expires > now())  | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Active",              Order=2),
  (K | where isnotnull(Revoked)                                        | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Revoked",             Order=3),
  (K | where Expires < now() and isnull(Revoked)                       | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Expired",             Order=4),
  (K | where isnull(Revoked) and Expires between(now() .. ago(-7d))    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Expiring in 7d",      Order=5),
  (K | where isnull(Revoked) and (isnull(Expires) or ExpirySeconds==0) | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Never expire",        Order=6),
  (K | where KeyType =~ "auth"                                         | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Auth keys",           Order=7),
  (K | where KeyType =~ "api" or KeyType contains "oauth"              | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="API / OAuth",         Order=8)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| summarize Count=count() by KeyType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Keys by type

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| where isnull(Revoked)
| extend Bucket = case(
    isnull(Expires) or ExpirySeconds == 0, "Never",
    Expires < now(), "Already expired",
    Expires < ago(-1d), "<24h",
    Expires < ago(-7d), "1-7d",
    Expires < ago(-30d), "8-30d",
    Expires < ago(-90d), "31-90d",
    "90+d")
| summarize Keys=count() by Bucket
| order by case(Bucket=="Already expired",1, Bucket=="<24h",2, Bucket=="1-7d",3, Bucket=="8-30d",4, Bucket=="31-90d",5, Bucket=="90+d",6, Bucket=="Never",7, 8) asc
content.title: Active key expiry distribution

content.query:
Tailscale_Keys_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by KeyId
| where isnull(Revoked)
| extend ExpiryStatus = case(
    isnull(Expires) or ExpirySeconds == 0, "Never expires",
    Expires < now(), "Expired",
    Expires < ago(-7d), "Expires in 7d",
    Expires < ago(-30d), "Expires in 30d",
    "OK")
| project KeyId, KeyType, Description, UserId, Created, Expires, ExpiryStatus, Capabilities
| order by Created desc
content.title: All active credentials with computed expiry status

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action contains "API_KEY" or Action contains "AUTH_KEY" or Action contains "OAUTH" or Action contains "KEY_CREATE" or Action contains "KEY_REVOKE"
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| extend TargetId=tostring(Target.id), TargetType=tostring(Target.type)
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, TargetType, TargetId, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent credential create / revoke / rotate events
content.noDataMessage: No credential CRUD activity in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Audit events per hour
content.noDataMessage: No audit events in this window.

content.json: Action heatmap by hour of day

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Hour=hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| summarize Events=count() by Hour, Action
| order by Hour asc, Events desc
content.title: When are admin actions happening?

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| where isnotempty(ActorLogin)
| summarize Events=count() by ActorLogin, Action
| order by Events desc | take 100
content.title: Who is firing which action
content.noDataMessage: No audit events in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| extend TargetType=tostring(Target.type), TargetName=tostring(coalesce(Target.name, Target.id))
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, TargetType, TargetName, Origin, EventGroupID
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Last 100 audit events
content.noDataMessage: No audit events in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Dns_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ConfigType
| project ConfigType, Nameservers, MagicDNS, SearchPaths, LastSnapshot=TimeGenerated
| order by ConfigType asc
content.title: MagicDNS, nameservers, search paths
content.noDataMessage: No DNS snapshots in the workspace yet. DNS polls runs at ~30 min cadence.

content.query:
Tailscale_Settings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by TenantId
| project DevicesApprovalOn, DevicesAutoUpdatesOn, DevicesKeyDurationDays, UsersApprovalOn, NetworkFlowLoggingOn, RegionalRoutingOn, PostureIdentityCollectionOn, UsersRoleAllowedToJoinExternalTailnets, LastSnapshot=TimeGenerated
content.title: Tailnet policy gates
content.noDataMessage: No settings snapshot yet.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend TargetProperty=tostring(Target.property)
| where Action contains "DNS" or TargetProperty has_any ("DNS_NAMESERVERS", "DNS_SPLIT_DNS", "MAGICDNS", "DNS_SEARCH_PATHS")
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, TargetProperty, Origin
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent DNS-related admin changes
content.noDataMessage: No DNS changes in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action == "ACL_UPDATE" or Action contains "ACL"
| extend ActorLogin=tostring(coalesce(Actor.loginName, Actor.displayName))
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, Origin, EventGroupID
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent ACL / policy file modifications
content.noDataMessage: No ACL changes in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where array_length(EnabledRoutes) > 0
| project DeviceName, User, Os, EnabledRoutes=tostring(EnabledRoutes), AdvertisedRoutes=tostring(AdvertisedRoutes), LastSeen
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: Routes currently being served from devices
content.noDataMessage: No subnet routers active in this tailnet.

content.query:
let NET = Tailscale_Network_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union
  (NET | summarize V=toreal(count())                          | extend Metric="Total flows",     Order=1),
  (NET | summarize V=toreal(dcount(SrcNodeName))              | extend Metric="Src nodes",       Order=2),
  (NET | summarize V=toreal(dcount(DstNodeName))              | extend Metric="Dst nodes",       Order=3),
  (NET | where HasVirtualTraffic | summarize V=toreal(count())| extend Metric="Virtual",         Order=4),
  (NET | where HasSubnetTraffic  | summarize V=toreal(count())| extend Metric="Subnet",          Order=5),
  (NET | where HasExitTraffic    | summarize V=toreal(count())| extend Metric="Exit",            Order=6),
  (NET | where IsRelayed         | summarize V=toreal(count())| extend Metric="Relayed (DERP)",  Order=7)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V
content.title: Activity (selected time range)
content.noDataMessage: No data in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SrcLabel = case(
    isnotempty(SrcUser), strcat(SrcNodeName, " - ", SrcUser),
    isnotempty(SrcTags), strcat(SrcNodeName, " ", tostring(SrcTags)),
    SrcNodeName)
| summarize Flows=count() by SrcLabel
| top 10 by Flows
content.title: Top source nodes by flow count
content.noDataMessage: No flow records in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend DstLabel = case(
    isnotempty(DstUser), strcat(DstNodeName, " - ", DstUser),
    isnotempty(DstTags), strcat(DstNodeName, " ", tostring(DstTags)),
    DstNodeName)
| extend DstKind = case(
    isnotempty(DstUser), "User device",
    isnotempty(DstTags), "Tagged service",
    "Other")
| summarize Flows=count() by DstLabel, DstKind
| top 10 by Flows
content.title: Top destination nodes (split by user vs tagged service)
content.noDataMessage: No flow records in this window.

content.json: Traffic mix over time (stacked area: Virtual / Subnet / Exit / Physical)

content.query:
let NET = Tailscale_Network_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union
  (NET | where HasVirtualTraffic  | summarize Flows=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m) | extend Kind="Virtual"),
  (NET | where HasSubnetTraffic   | summarize Flows=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m) | extend Kind="Subnet"),
  (NET | where HasExitTraffic     | summarize Flows=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m) | extend Kind="Exit"),
  (NET | where HasPhysicalTraffic | summarize Flows=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m) | extend Kind="Physical")
| project TimeGenerated, Kind, Flows
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Flow count by traffic kind over time
content.noDataMessage: No flow records.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by Path = iff(IsRelayed, "Relayed (DERP)", "Direct (P2P)")
| project Path, Count
content.title: Direct vs relayed
content.noDataMessage: No flow records.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IsRelayed
| extend SrcLabel = strcat(SrcNodeName, iff(isempty(SrcUser),"",strcat(" (",SrcUser,")")))
| summarize RelayedFlows=count(), LastRelay=max(TimeGenerated) by SrcLabel, SrcOs
| top 10 by RelayedFlows
content.title: Devices stuck on DERP (potential NAT/firewall issue)
content.noDataMessage: No data in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SrcKind = case(
    isnotempty(SrcTags), tostring(SrcTags),
    isnotempty(SrcUser), "<user>",
    "<unknown>")
| extend DstKind = case(
    isnotempty(DstTags), tostring(DstTags),
    isnotempty(DstUser), "<user>",
    "<unknown>")
| summarize Flows=count() by SrcKind, DstKind
| order by Flows desc
content.title: Tagged-service flow matrix
content.noDataMessage: No data in this window.

content.query:
let baseline = Tailscale_Network_CL
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct SrcNodeName, DstNodeName;
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where HasVirtualTraffic or HasSubnetTraffic or HasExitTraffic
| extend ShortSrc = tostring(split(SrcNodeName, ".")[0])
| extend ShortDst = tostring(split(DstNodeName, ".")[0])
| extend ShortSrcUser = tostring(split(SrcUser, "@")[0])
| extend ShortDstUser = tostring(split(DstUser, "@")[0])
| extend Src = strcat(ShortSrc, iff(isempty(ShortSrcUser),"",strcat(" - ",ShortSrcUser)))
| extend Dst = strcat(ShortDst, iff(isempty(ShortDstUser),"",strcat(" - ",ShortDstUser)))
| summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), Flows=count() by Src, Dst, SrcNodeName, DstNodeName
| join kind=leftanti baseline on SrcNodeName, DstNodeName
| project FirstSeen, Src, Dst, Flows
| order by FirstSeen desc
content.title: Anomaly: pairs NOT seen in past 7 days
content.noDataMessage: No new src/dst pairs - all flows match the 7-day baseline.

content.json: Egress destinations - exit nodes + subnet routes

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where HasExitTraffic
| extend ExitTag = iff(isempty(DstTags), DstNodeName, tostring(DstTags))
| summarize Flows=count() by ExitTag
content.title: Exit-node tag distribution
content.noDataMessage: No exit-node traffic in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where HasSubnetTraffic
| mv-expand s=SubnetTraffic
| extend DstHost = tostring(split(tostring(s.dst), ":")[0])
| extend Bytes = toint(coalesce(s.txBytes,0)) + toint(coalesce(s.rxBytes,0))
| extend Pkts = toint(coalesce(s.txPkts,0)) + toint(coalesce(s.rxPkts,0))
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(Bytes), TotalPkts=sum(Pkts), Talkers=dcount(SrcNodeName) by DstHost
| top 10 by TotalBytes
| project DstHost, TotalBytes, TotalPkts, Talkers
content.title: Top subnet route destinations
content.noDataMessage: No subnet-route traffic in this window.

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
| project TimeGenerated,
    Src=SrcNodeName, SrcUser, SrcTags=tostring(SrcTags),
    Dst=DstNodeName, DstUser, DstTags=tostring(DstTags),
    Vir=HasVirtualTraffic, Sub=HasSubnetTraffic, Exi=HasExitTraffic, Phy=HasPhysicalTraffic, IsRelayed
content.title: Last 100 flow records in time range
content.noDataMessage: No data in this window.

content.json: Posture integrations - MDM/EDR providers configured for device posture

content.query:
let CUR = Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId;
union
  (CUR | summarize V=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Integrations",       Order=1),
  (CUR | summarize V=toreal(dcount(Provider))   | extend Metric="Distinct providers", Order=2),
  (CUR | where tostring(Status) has "healthy" or tostring(Status) has "ok"
       | summarize V=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Healthy",            Order=3),
  (CUR | where not(tostring(Status) has "healthy" or tostring(Status) has "ok")
       | summarize V=toreal(count())            | extend Metric="Unhealthy / unknown", Order=4)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V
content.title: Integration inventory (selected time range)
content.noDataMessage: No posture integrations configured. Set them up at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/posture-integrations.

content.query:
Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId
| summarize Count=count() by Provider
content.title: Integrations by provider
content.noDataMessage: No posture integrations configured.

content.query:
Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId
| extend Health = case(
    tostring(Status) has "healthy" or tostring(Status) has "ok", "Healthy",
    tostring(Status) has "error" or tostring(Status) has "failed", "Error",
    isnotempty(tostring(Status)), "Other",
    "Unknown")
| summarize Count=count() by Health
content.title: Health status across integrations
content.noDataMessage: No posture integrations configured.

content.query:
Tailscale_PostureIntegrations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IntegrationId
| project IntegrationId, Provider, CloudId, ClientId, TenantId_Provider, Status, LastSnapshot=TimeGenerated
content.title: Configured integrations (latest snapshot per IntegrationId)
content.noDataMessage: No posture integrations configured.

content.query:
Tailscale_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType == "CONFIG"
| where tostring(Target.type) contains "POSTURE" or tostring(Target.type) contains "INTEGRATION"
| project TimeGenerated, Actor=tostring(Actor.loginName), Action,
          Target=tostring(Target.name), TargetType=tostring(Target.type), ActionDetails
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent posture integration create/update/delete events
content.noDataMessage: No posture-integration audit events in this window.

content.query:
union withsource=Table Tailscale_Audit_CL, Tailscale_Devices_CL, Tailscale_Users_CL, Tailscale_Keys_CL, Tailscale_Dns_CL, Tailscale_Settings_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Rows=count() by Table, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Rows ingested per Tailscale table per hour (last 24h)
content.noDataMessage: No Tailscale data ingested in the last 24h - check the connector card under Sentinel Data Connectors.

content.json: Last poll time per table

content.query:
union withsource=Table Tailscale_Audit_CL, Tailscale_Devices_CL, Tailscale_Users_CL, Tailscale_Keys_CL, Tailscale_Dns_CL, Tailscale_Settings_CL
| summarize LastRow=max(TimeGenerated), TotalRows=count() by Table
| extend MinutesAgo=toint((now() - LastRow) / 1m)
| extend Status=case(MinutesAgo < 60, "Fresh", MinutesAgo < 360, "Recent", MinutesAgo < 1440, "Stale", "Very Stale")
| project Table, LastRow, MinutesAgo, TotalRows, Status
| order by MinutesAgo asc
content.title: Per-table freshness

content.query:
_LogOperation
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where _ResourceId contains "tailscale" or Detail contains "Tailscale_"
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, Level, Detail
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Log Analytics operational events touching Tailscale tables
content.noDataMessage: No operational issues recorded in the last 24h.

content.json: Tailscale Operations (Premium) (CCF) - Microsoft Sentinel content from the Tailscale (CCF) solution, Premium-tier surface. Tables polled from the Tailscale REST API: audit, devices, users, keys, dns, settings, network flows (/logging/network), posture integrations. Filter every panel via the time range above; the Investigate tab adds Actor and Device pickers for drilldown. The Network Flows and Posture tabs use the 15 promoted columns added in 3.1.0 (SrcUser, SrcTags, DstUser, DstTags, HasVirtualTraffic, HasSubnetTraffic, HasExitTraffic, HasPhysicalTraffic, IsRelayed, etc.). Companion workbook: Tailscale Operations (Standard) for Personal / Starter tailnets.
